CustomField.description: Constant Contact list id this Campaign maps to (topic = Campaign = CC list). The JSI-108 inbound preference sync resolves a constituent's CC list membership to this Campaign via this field, then upserts a CampaignMember. Set on CC List record-type Campaigns. JSI-108 / Jason Ott.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The Constant Contact list ID this campaign represents. Used to sync topic subscriptions from CC. Do not edit unless remapping the list.
CustomField.label: CC List ID
